_note: Slottable (active) Champion Point stars only — Is slotable: Yes on ESO Hub. Passive nodes (Is slotable: No) are applied unconditionally in compute-stats.ts via CP_PASSIVE_VALUES. Verified 2026-05-31. Warfare: 35 stars | Fitness: 28 stars.

warfare.name: Master-at-Arms
warfare.effect: Increases your damage done with direct damage attacks.

warfare.name: Deadly Aim
warfare.effect: Increases your damage done with single target attacks.

warfare.name: Biting Aura
warfare.effect: Increases your damage done with area of effect attacks.

warfare.name: Thaumaturge
warfare.effect: Increases your damage done with damage over time effects.

warfare.name: Fighting Finesse
warfare.effect: Increases your critical damage and critical healing done.

warfare.name: Wrathful Strikes
warfare.effect: Grants 205 Weapon and Spell Damage to your damaging abilities.

warfare.name: Exploiter
warfare.effect: Increases your damage done against Off Balance enemies by 10%.

warfare.name: Force of Nature
warfare.effect: Increases your Offensive Penetration by 660 for every status effect your target has.

warfare.name: Untamed Aggression
warfare.effect: Increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by 150.

warfare.name: Backstabber
warfare.effect: Increases your critical damage done by 10% against enemies you are flanking.

warfare.name: Occult Overload
warfare.effect: Whenever you kill an enemy under the effect of a status effect, they explode for 5185 Oblivion Damage to nearby enemies and apply a random status effect to each one hit.

warfare.name: Arcane Supremacy
warfare.effect: Increases Maximum Magicka by 1300.

warfare.name: Endless Endurance
warfare.effect: Increases Maximum Stamina by 1300.

warfare.name: Ironclad
warfare.effect: Reduces your damage taken by direct damage attacks by 6%.

warfare.name: Resilience
warfare.effect: Grants 660 Critical Resistance.

warfare.name: Duelist's Rebuff
warfare.effect: Reduces your damage taken by single target attacks by 6%.

warfare.name: Unassailable
warfare.effect: Reduces your damage taken by area of effect attacks by 6%.

warfare.name: Enduring Resolve
warfare.effect: Reduces your damage taken by damage over time attacks by 6%.

warfare.name: Cleansing Revival
warfare.effect: Healing a target under 25% Health removes all harmful effects from them (once every 24 seconds).

warfare.name: Focused Mending
warfare.effect: Increases your healing done with single target heals.

warfare.name: Soothing Tide
warfare.effect: Increases your healing done with area of effect heals by 10%.

warfare.name: Swift Renewal
warfare.effect: Increases your healing done with healing over time effects by 10%.

warfare.name: Bulwark
warfare.effect: While you have a Shield or Frost Staff equipped, your Spell and Physical Resistance is increased by 1900.

warfare.name: Cutting Defense
warfare.effect: You deal Magic Damage to attackers whenever they damage you with a direct damage attack within 7 meters. Scales off the higher of your Physical or Spell Resistance and can activate your Weapon Enchantments and Poisons.

warfare.name: Enlivening Overflow
warfare.effect: Overhealing yourself or an ally grants them Health, Magicka, and Stamina Recovery equal to 0.5% of your Max Magicka, up to a cap of 150, for 6 seconds. This effect can occur once every 12 seconds per target.

warfare.name: Foresight
warfare.effect: After you drink a potion, the cost of your Magicka and Stamina healing abilities used within 6 seconds are reduced by 75%.

warfare.name: From the Brink
warfare.effect: Whenever you heal yourself or an ally under 25% Health, you grant them a damage shield that absorbs up to 2200 damage per stage, for 6 seconds. This effect can occur once every 30 seconds per target.

warfare.name: Hope Infusion
warfare.effect: Healing yourself or an ally under 50% Health grants them Minor Heroism for 1 second for every 300 Magicka Recovery you have. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds per target.

warfare.name: Last Stand
warfare.effect: When you take damage below 20% Health you gain Major Heroism, granting 3 Ultimate every 1.5 seconds for 9 seconds. This effect can occur once every 9 seconds.

warfare.name: Reaving Blows
warfare.effect: When you deal direct damage you heal for 7% of the damage done.

warfare.name: Reinforced
warfare.effect: When you begin Bracing, you gain a damage shield that absorbs 5140 damage for 3 seconds. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds.

warfare.name: Rejuvenator
warfare.effect: Grants 41 Weapon and Spell Damage to your healing abilities per stage.

warfare.name: Riposte
warfare.effect: When you block an attack from an enemy within 7 meters, your next direct damage attack made within 5 seconds deals 33% additional damage. This effect can occur once every 5 seconds.

warfare.name: Salve of Renewal
warfare.effect: Whenever you remove a harmful effect from yourself or an ally, you sanctify the ground beneath them and heal them and allies within 8 meters for 1280 Health per stage. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds.

warfare.name: Weapons Expert
warfare.effect: Increases your damage done with Light and Heavy Attacks by 4% per stage.

fitness.name: Boundless Vitality
fitness.effect: Grants 1400 Maximum Health.

fitness.name: Fortified
fitness.effect: Grants 1731 Armor.

fitness.name: Rejuvenation
fitness.effect: Grants 90 Health, Magicka, and Stamina Recovery.

fitness.name: Celerity
fitness.effect: Increases your Movement Speed by 10%.

fitness.name: Bracing Anchor
fitness.effect: While in combat, increases the amount of damage you can block by 20%, but reduces your Movement Speed by 16%.

fitness.name: Bastion
fitness.effect: Increases the effectiveness of your damage shields and damage against shielded enemies by 15%.

fitness.name: Juggernaut
fitness.effect: While under the effects of crowd control immunity, you take 5% less damage.

fitness.name: Survival Instincts
fitness.effect: While afflicted with a status effect, your core combat skills cost 25% less.

fitness.name: Slippery
fitness.effect: When you are affected by a disabling effect, you automatically Break Free for no cost. Triggers a 21-second Winded cooldown.

fitness.name: Pain's Refuge
fitness.effect: Reduces your damage taken by 2% for every 2 negative effects active on you, up to a maximum of 20%.

fitness.name: Relentlessness
fitness.effect: Being Stunned or Feared causes you to gain Major Protection for 3 seconds, reducing your damage taken by 10%.

fitness.name: Sustained by Suffering
fitness.effect: Increases your Health, Magicka, and Stamina Recovery by 150 while under the effects of a negative effect.

fitness.name: Arcane Alacrity
fitness.effect: While under the effects of a damage shield, your Roll Dodge costs 160 less Stamina per stage.

fitness.name: Bloody Renewal
fitness.effect: Restore 300 Stamina per stage, whenever you kill an enemy.

fitness.name: Expert Evasion
fitness.effect: Your next Roll Dodge is free of cost. After consuming this effect, you cannot gain it again for 30 seconds.

fitness.name: Hardened
fitness.effect: Increases the duration of Crowd Control Immunity by 3% per stage.

fitness.name: On Guard
fitness.effect: While under the effects of Crowd Control Immunity, increases the amount of damage you block by 2% per stage.

fitness.name: Peace of Mind
fitness.effect: Increases Magicka and Health Recovery while under the effects of Crowd Control Immunity by 40 per stage.

fitness.name: Refreshing Stride
fitness.effect: While Sprinting you gain 100 Health and Magicka Recovery per stage.

fitness.name: Rousing Speed
fitness.effect: Reduces the cost of Sprint by 50 Stamina per stage, while under the effects of Crowd Control Immunity.

fitness.name: Shield Master
fitness.effect: Reduces the cost of your damage shield abilities by 2% per stage.

fitness.name: Siphoning Spells
fitness.effect: Restore 300 Magicka per stage, whenever you kill an enemy.

fitness.name: Soothing Shield
fitness.effect: When you successfully block an attack you have a 15% chance to restore 147 Health per stage.

fitness.name: Spirit Mastery
fitness.effect: Decreases the time it takes to resurrect an ally by 33%.

fitness.name: Strategic Reserve
fitness.effect: Gain 30 Health Recovery for every 10 Ultimate you have.

fitness.name: Thrill of the Hunt
fitness.effect: Whenever you kill an enemy you gain Major Expedition for 3 seconds per stage, increasing your Movement Speed by 30%.

fitness.name: Unchained
fitness.effect: When you use Break Free, the cost of your next Stamina ability used within 5 seconds is reduced by 11% per stage.

fitness.name: Ward Master
fitness.effect: Reduces your damage taken by 2% per stage while Blocking and under the effects of a Damage Shield.
